coverage_note: The bundled TLR10 population database is literature oriented and does not include a complete allele-frequency panel. Interpretation should remain ancestry-, phenotype-, tissue-, assay-, and LD-aware.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from TLR10 asthma, atopy, airway, epithelial-barrier, and immune-inflammatory literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000174123: TLR10 coordinates and transcripts

gene_population_patterns.summary: rs4129009 is curated as a low-penetrance research signal in TLR10 or a linked locus; cohort design, ancestry, LD, and phenotype definition matter.
TLR1/TLR6/TLR10 cluster model is curated as a low-penetrance research signal in TLR10 or a linked locus; cohort design, ancestry, LD, and phenotype definition matter.
TLR10 interpretation is most useful when sequence, methylation, expression, tissue, and allergic-immune phenotype evidence are integrated rather than treated as a single deterministic SNP call.
